name: PlatiScan
description:
PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection. || PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection. | PlatiScan VI Automated Optical Inspection

Mit PlatiScan VI wurde ein neuartiges optisches Inspektionssystem (engl. visual inspection system) entwickelt.

Das System besteht aus einem handelsüblichen Windows-PC auf dem unsere spezielle Software installiert ist, die zur Auswertung der Bilder dient und die Bilderfassung wird realisiert durch eine herkömmliche Digitalkamera in einer individuell gewünschten Konfiguration als "Standalone" oder "Integrated" System.

Unser PlatiScan VI System wurde der menschlichen Vorgehensweise einer manuellen Sichtprüfung nachgebildet, so kann eine manuelle Sichtprüfung per Computer automatisiert werden. Hierdurch wird die Fehlererkennungsrate und die gesamte Testabdeckung deutlich erhöht.

Unter anderem sind bereits heute folgende Applikationen realisiert worden:

    * Board-Check
    * LED-Check
    * Display-Check
    * Jet-Test

Natürlich sind mit dem PlatiScan VI System auch andere Anwendungsgebiete möglich.
Sprechen Sie uns doch einfach heute noch an und lassen Sie sich über die Lösung Ihrer individuellen Testbedürfnisse beraten.

name: ATHENAIS

name: Sweeper
description: SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. Until now this has never been achieved and it will ensure Europe’s leading role in agricultural robotics.  In modern greenhouses there is a high demand to automate labour. The availability of a skilled workforce that accepts repetitive tasks in the harsh climate conditions of a greenhouse is decreasing rapidly. The current state of the art in automated harvesting of fruits and vegetables has remained remarkably stationary in the past decades. In the EU-FP7-project CROPS (www.crops-robots.eu) extensive research has been performed on agricultural robotics. One of the applications was a sweet pepper harvesting robot. SWEEPER will use the technology developed in CROPS to introduce, test and validate a robotic harvesting solution for sweet pepper under real-world conditions.  The project involves 6 partners from 4 different countries (The Netherlands, Belgium, Sweden and Israel). The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management. || SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. | SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. name: Affix Engineering
description:
Affix Engineering provides engineering services focused on industrial robot programming, machine vision solutions, AI and autonomous systems, and process optimization. The company programs robots from multiple brands for applications such as welding, pick and place, palletizing, assembly, and material handling. It designs and integrates 2D and 3D machine vision for inspection, quality control, bin picking, flex feeding, conveyor tracking, and depalletizing. Affix Engineering also develops custom software and AI-based automation to support decision-making and intelligent systems. Its engineers work with system integrators, machine builders, and end customers across sectors including automotive, food, technology, aerospace, pharmaceuticals, logistics, wood, and metalworking. || Affix Engineering is a specialist in programming industrial robots and has a goal to make the use of robots easier and more accessible. With years of experience and in-depth knowledge in the field of robotics and machine vision, Affix Engineering is able give everyone the tools and expertise for robot automation and machine vision. 

This is especially of great value for small and medium-sized businesses (MKB), where companies often do not have sufficient experience with robots and vision equipment. Because Affix also supports and advises the smaller and less wealthy companies in the implementation of automation solutions, these companies (including integrators and machine builders) can enjoy new and innovative technical solutions without any worries.

We are brand independent and familiar with most brands and systems. Through the development of software packages and various R&D processes, we are used to complex tasks, we can solve problems, improve processes and work with other people's software.

With approximately 8 programmers, Affix is working on various large and small projects for different customers in all imaginable branches, including: Automotive, Food, Technology, Aerospace, Pharmaceuticals, Logistics, Metal, ... . By working together as a team, with each other and with our partners, Affix is from the beginning of a project a real addition.

name: Qtechnology
description:
Qtechnology designs and manufactures customised smart cameras and develop complete machine vision systems that are tailored to our clients' application-specific needs. With mechanics, electrical, software, and science resources in-house, we can develop complete system designs. In some projects, we handle full OEM projects from idea to system implementation, while assisting during part of the development process or simply supplying smart cameras in other projects. With experience from several industries and thousands of cameras installed worldwide, we understand the requirements for quality and reliability to keep factories running 24/7/365. Our smart cameras have been exploited to design novel vision systems within a range of application fields. Some typical application fields include factory automatization, sorting and grading, gauging and tracking, pattern recognition, medical diagnostics, visual inspection, quality control, guidance, object categorization, and mechanical diagnostics. Qtechnology cameras are high-quality, intelligent single and multi-channel CCD and CMOS cameras, for industrial applications. Our camera products range from monochrome, colour and multichannel CCD/CMOS cameras resolutions to several megapixels matrix cameras. For high colour accuracy and multispectral applications including UV, NIR, LWIR, etc., we also offer 3CCD and 5CCD cameras with dichroic prism technology. Finally, we also develop solutions based on x-ray and microbolometer imaging technology. name: xis.ai
description:
xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics. Our primary focus is on revolutionizing industrial quality inspection through advanced computer vision technology.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of software and hardware solutions designed to streamline the development and deployment of AI-powered visual inspection systems:

1. Software:
   - xis dev: A no-code platform that allows non-technical users to develop computer vision models without coding knowledge. It includes features like AI-assisted labelling, model training, and performance analytics.
   - xis Runtime: A lightweight platform for deploying computer vision models in production environments, offering real-time analytics and integration with various industrial cameras and sensors.

2. Hardware:
   - Edge AI: Deployment of AI algorithms directly on edge devices like cameras or sensors for real-time analysis and faster decision-making.
   - Support for various visual sensors: Industrial cameras, microscopes, thermal cameras, and X-ray tubes.

xis.ai's platform is designed to be user-friendly, enabling non-technical industrial professionals to develop and implement AI-based visual inspection solutions quickly and efficiently. This approach aims to make advanced quality control technologies more accessible to various industries and applications. || xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics.
